title: My Job to Care
lesson: Looking after a pet every day teaches you to be responsible and caring.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image into a cozy living room, warm light. The person from the input image sits on the far left gently holding a small fluffy brown puppy, facing the camera with a delighted smile and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels nearby smiling warmly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy home kitchen — a pet food bowl and a water bowl, warm light — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left in the mid-ground, nodding attentively with one hand resting on their chin, facing the camera with the face fully visible, listening as a small fluffy brown puppy sits at their feet. In the right foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} points to the pet food bowl and the water bowl, explaining. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy home kitchen — a pet food bowl and a water bowl, warm light — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels alone pouring kibble into the pet food bowl for a small fluffy brown puppy, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, with a caring, focused expression. The puppy waits happily beside the bowl. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image into a sunny garden, bright daylight. The person from the input image walks on the far left holding a leash, facing the camera with a cheerful smile and the face fully visible, as a small fluffy brown puppy trots along on the leash to the right. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy living room, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits alone gently brushing and cuddling a small fluffy brown puppy, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, with a tender, happy expression. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy living room, golden afternoon light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left with the healthy, happy small fluffy brown puppy in their lap, facing the camera with a proud, joyful smile and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels beside them, resting a gentle hand on their shoulder with a warm, approving smile. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: One morning you cuddled a little brown puppy. "He's so soft!" you said. Mum smiled nearby.
"A puppy needs care every day," said Mum, pointing to the food and water bowls. You listened closely.
You knelt down and poured the puppy's food into the bowl. The puppy waited happily beside you.
Out in the garden, you took the puppy for a walk on the leash. Trot, trot, trot!
Back inside, you gently brushed and cuddled your puppy. He felt happy and loved.
The healthy, happy puppy snuggled in your lap. "You take good care of him," said Mum. Caring is your job!
